name: SILENT CONTROL

abilities.name: Spreading Confusion
abilities.text: When this model causes an enemy model to gain an Entranced token, increase this crew's leverage bar by 1. Then, this model may look at the top card of its fate deck and may discard it.

keyword_actions.granted_to: Friendly unique Qi and Gong models

actions.name: We Own You
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Reduce this crew's leverage bar by 4.
actions.effects: Target declares an action, chosen and controlled by this model.

extraction_notes: Crew card shows a leverage bar with positions 1, 2, 3, 4
Spreading Confusion ability applies to non-unique Qi and Gong models based on scope description
We Own You is a signature action (indicated by ‡ symbol)
Leverage bar mechanic is central to this crew's gameplay
